sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n9422" key="a)ntamoibo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀντᾰμοιβός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n9422.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἀντημοιβός.</ref> </xr> </sense> </entryFree>
